inputs.label: Initial Investment
inputs.businessContext: Total upfront cost including equipment, installation, and training. Based on capital budgeting standards (CAPM, NPV).

inputs.label: Annual Cash Inflow
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual net cash inflow from the investment. Used in payback period and NPV calculations.

inputs.label: Discount Rate
inputs.businessContext: Required rate of return or cost of capital. Typically based on WACC or industry benchmark (e.g., CAPM).

inputs.label: Project Life (Years)
inputs.businessContext: Expected duration of the investment's cash flows. Used for NPV and IRR calculations.

inputs.label: Salvage Value
inputs.businessContext: Estimated residual value at end of project life. Included in final year cash flow for NPV.

inputs.label: Annual Operating Cost
inputs.businessContext: Recurring costs such as maintenance, labor, and utilities. Subtracted from cash inflow to get net cash flow.

inputs.label: Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Corporate tax rate applied to net income. Affects after-tax cash flows in NPV.

inputs.label: Depreciation Method
inputs.businessContext: Method for allocating depreciation expense. Straight-line is simplest; accelerated methods provide tax shield earlier.

inputs.label: Inflation Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual inflation. Used to adjust nominal cash flows to real terms if needed.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Subjective confidence in input data quality. Affects risk adjustment in final outputs.

thresholds.paybackPeriodYears: if paybackPeriodYears > projectLifeYears then 'Payback period exceeds project life; investment may not recover.'
thresholds.npv: if npv < 0 then 'Negative NPV; investment may not meet required return.'
thresholds.irr: if irr < discountRate then 'IRR below discount rate; project may not be viable.'

formulas.annualDepreciation: if depreciationMethod == 'straight-line' then (initialInvestment - salvageValue) / projectLifeYears else if depreciationMethod == 'double-declining' then (2 / projectLifeYears) * (initialInvestment - accumulatedDepreciation) else if depreciationMethod == 'sum-of-years-digits' then (remainingLife / sumOfYears) * (initialInvestment - salvageValue)
formulas.cumulativeCashFlow: for year i: cumulativeCashFlow[i] = cumulativeCashFlow[i-1] + annualNetCashFlow[i]
formulas.paybackPeriodYears: if annualNetCashFlow > 0 then initialInvestment / annualNetCashFlow else Infinity
formulas.dataConfidenceAdjustedNpv: if dataConfidence == 'low' then npv * 0.8 else if dataConfidence == 'medium' then npv * 0.95 else npv

hiddenLossDrivers: if paybackPeriodYears > projectLifeYears then 'Payback period exceeds project life'
if irr < discountRate then 'IRR below discount rate'
suggestedActions: if npv < 0 then 'Consider reducing initial investment or increasing cash inflows.'
if paybackPeriodYears > projectLifeYears then 'Extend project life or reduce payback period.'
if irr < discountRate then 'Re-evaluate discount rate or improve project returns.'
